name: Customer Support Agent
description: AI-powered agent that handles tier-1 support queries routes escalations and drafts responses using the company knowledge base and customer history.
current_pain_point: Manual triage takes 3–4 hrs/day per agent and response quality is inconsistent.

name: Product Return Processing
description: Automate return eligibility checks generate shipping labels and process refunds with minimal human review for standard return cases.
current_pain_point: Manual processing takes up to 2 days and error rates cause customer complaints.

name: Troubleshooting Product Issues
description: Interactive AI diagnostic assistant that guides customers through product issue resolution via dynamic decision trees and context-aware guidance.
current_pain_point: High call volume for issues that could be self-served; no scalable digital alternative.
